hero.title: About Divinci AI
hero.subtitle: Transforming how humans and AI work together

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: At Divinci AI, we're on a mission to create AI systems that augment human capabilities while keeping humans at the center of the experience. We believe that the most powerful AI tools are those that enhance human creativity, productivity, and connection.

items.title: Human-Centered AI
items.description: We design AI systems that empower people rather than replace them, always keeping human needs and well-being at the forefront.

items.title: Ethical Innovation
items.description: We are committed to developing AI responsibly, with rigorous attention to fairness, transparency, and the societal impact of our technology.

items.title: Collaborative Intelligence
items.description: We believe in creating systems where humans and AI work together, combining the creativity and judgment of people with the analytical power of machines.

items.title: Continuous Learning
items.description: We embrace a culture of constant improvement, learning from our users, our mistakes, and evolving research to build better AI systems.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Meet the people behind Divinci AI

members.name: Dr. Joel Fuhrman
members.title: Founder & CEO
members.bio: With over 15 years of experience in AI and machine learning, Dr. Fuhrman leads our vision to create human-centered AI systems.

members.name: Sean Fuhrman
members.title: CTO
members.bio: Sean oversees our technical strategy and implementation, ensuring our systems are robust, scalable, and secure.

members.name: Sierra Hooshiari
members.title: Chief AI Ethics Officer
members.bio: Sierra guides our approach to responsible AI development, focusing on fairness, transparency, and social impact.

members.name: Abdul Rahman
members.title: Head of Product
members.bio: Abdul leads our product development, translating cutting-edge AI capabilities into intuitive user experiences.

members.name: Paul-Marie Carfantan
members.title: Lead AI Researcher
members.bio: Paul-Marie directs our research initiatives, keeping us at the forefront of innovations in natural language processing and multimodal AI.

members.name: Bryan Reynolds
members.title: VP of Customer Success
members.bio: Bryan ensures our customers receive exceptional support and maximize the value of our AI solutions.

story.title: Our Story
story.content:
Divinci AI was founded in 2021 with a clear vision: to create AI tools that enhance human capabilities rather than replace them. Our journey began when Dr. Joel Fuhrman, frustrated with the limitations and dehumanizing aspects of existing AI systems, assembled a team of experts to build something different.

From our early prototypes to our current suite of products, we've remained committed to keeping humans at the center of the AI experience. We've grown from a small team of five to a diverse organization of over fifty professionals dedicated to advancing human-AI collaboration.

Today, we're proud to be leading the industry in creating AI systems that truly augment human potential, helping people become more creative, productive, and connected through thoughtfully designed AI.

join.title: Join Our Team
join.content: We're always looking for talented individuals who share our passion for human-centered AI. Check our Careers page for current openings.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.content: Have questions about Divinci AI? Our team is here to help.
